title: The Wall Street Journal: What to Know About the Trump Administration’s New Green Card Policy | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP

## The Wall Street Journal: What to Know About the Trump Administration’s New Green Card Policy

Questions remain about how a recent USCIS memo will affect adjustment of status adjudications in the US. In an article published in The Wall Street Journal , Partner K. Edward Raleigh explained that the memo appears to encourage officers to take a more cautious approach when determining whether applicants should complete the green card process from within the country or abroad.
